title: ToolTreaux 10 Watt Mini Glue Gun and Hot Glue Sticks Crafting Supplies Kit, 15pc
description:
A hobby tools and crafting supplies essential, this 10 watt mini glue gun and hot glue sticks combo from ToolTreaux works with a huge variety of materials and is suitable for all kinds of arts and crafts projects. Measuring five inches tall, the glue gun is lightweight and easy to maneuver! It features a long cord with Type A plug in, a built in table safety rest, insulated aluminum hot melting nozzle and a fuse for extra safety. The kit includes 14 hot glue sticks that are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes! Setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond

Measuring five inches tall, the glue gun is lightweight and easy to maneuver! It features a long cord with Type A plug in, a built in table safety rest, insulated aluminum hot melting nozzle and a fuse for extra safety.

Key Features

  • GLUE GUN AND HOT GLUE STICKS CRAFT KIT: A hobby tools and crafting supplies essential, this 10 watt mini glue gun and hot glue sticks combo from ToolTreaux works with a huge variety of materials and is suitable for all kinds of arts and crafts projects
  • 10 WATT MINI GLUE GUN: Measuring five inches tall, the glue gun is lightweight and easy to maneuver! It features a long cord with Type A plug in, a built in table safety rest, insulated aluminum hot melting nozzle and a fuse for extra safety
  • X14 HOT GLUE STICKS INCLUDED: The 4 inch hot glue sticks are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes; Setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond
  • CRAFTING SUPPLIES ESSENTIAL: Whether it’s art and crafts, DIY, repairs, jewelry making, kids’ art projects and more, the mini glue gun and hot glue sticks are a must-have for all kinds of crafting projects; the smaller glue gun size makes it great for little hands and supervised kid’s activities
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Glue Gun Dimensions: 5 x 3.75 x 1 inches; Glue Sticks Dimensions: 4 x 0.27 inches; Color: Off White, Yellow, Clear; Weight: 6.4 ounces; Plug in Type A; Kit Includes: 1 Glue Gun, 14 Hot Glue Sticks

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TZ65516500
  • UPC: 810058483935
  • Color: White
  • Size: Medium

The kit includes 14 hot glue sticks that are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes! Setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond.

Whether it’s art and crafts, DIY, repairs, jewelry making, kids’ art projects and more, the mini glue gun and hot glue sticks are a must-have for all kinds of creative projects whether at home or in a school setting. And notably, the smaller glue gun size makes it great for little hands and supervised kid’s activities!

Happy crafting!
